name: Apple- Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the egg with the juice or milk, oil, and vanilla extract.
2. Stir in the flour, sugars, baking powder, and salt until just combined; the batter will be lumpy.
3. Fold in the chopped nuts and apple.
4. Fill prepared muffin tins (greased or paper-lined) with the batter.
5. Sprinkle each muffin with cinnamon-sugar mixture.
6. Bake at 400°F for 20 minutes, or until golden brown.
